name: Matthew Smith
notes: 6.5-year Facebook ads agency. Uses Go High Level. Initially pitched ad creation automation. Follow-up call revealed interest in 7+ systems: LinkedIn automation, cold email lead gen, Instagram, content creation, recruitment/HR agent, SEO blog writer, AI/LLM visibility. Seasonal business, manages ~50 clients. Wants to scale to 100+. Big upsell opportunity.

timeline.event: Discovery call — 6.5-year Facebook ads agency, uses Go High Level, wants ad creation automation
Pre-call questions prepared + sales script, pitch deck, and proposal generated
Follow-up call — Mat revealed interest in 7+ systems beyond ad creation. WhatsApp group to be created. Saturday follow-up call scheduled.

current_status: Follow-up call completed. Mat interested in multiple systems (LinkedIn, cold email, Instagram, content, HR agent, SEO, AI/LLM visibility). WhatsApp group being created. Next call: Saturday to demo systems.
